ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Sweet pepper, green, yellow or red, raw

ingredients_text: Salade Grecque Salade verte 38,1%, dès de BREBIS 22.2% (LAIT pasteurisé de brebis 96,32%, sel 2.4%, ferments LACTIQUES 1,2%, enzyme coagulante, chlorure de calcium), concombre 15,9%, poivrons 9,5%, tomate cerise 9,5%, olives noires 4,8%.
